name: Apricot Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 medium can crushed pineapple, juice reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jell-O in hot water.
2. Add cold water and drained pineapple to the Jell-O mixture.
3. Stir in mashed bananas.
4. Pour the mixture into a 13x9 inch pan and sprinkle with miniature marshmallows.
5. Place in the refrigerator and let set.
TOPPING:
1. Mix sugar, egg, flour, butter, and pineapple juice until thick.
2. Add cream cheese and blend together.
3. Cool the mixture and prepare one large package of Dream Whip.
4. Fold in the cooled topping mixture.
5. Spread on top of the Jell-O.
6. Keep in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
